common.name: Name
common.syncingData: Please wait while data is syncing.
common.noContentYet: There is nothing to display right now.
common.confirmHintDefault: Changes take effect immediately once confirmed.
common.confirmHintWarning: Double-check the current selection before continuing.
common.confirmHintDestructive: This action modifies current data and usually cannot be undone.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.loadingDesc: Syncing system statistics and usage data.
dashboard.schedulerOverviewDesc: Shows the live background refresh status, next scan time, and current batch progress.
dashboard.schedulerOverviewEstimate: This area shows the live background refresh state and the latest completed cycle.
dashboard.currentBatchHint: Scans every {{interval}} min and refreshes {{preExpire}} min before expiry.
dashboard.schedulerTaskIdleHint: No refresh task is running right now
dashboard.schedulerTaskDisabledHint: Automatic scanning is disabled; refresh accounts manually when needed
dashboard.schedulerTaskNotStartedHint: The first scheduled scan has not run yet since startup
dashboard.schedulerScopeHint: This scheduler watches all {{total}} accounts and only queues the ones that currently need work.

accounts.title: Accounts
accounts.loadingDesc: Syncing the account pool and live status.
accounts.importJsonDesc: Compatible with CLIProxyAPI and Sub2Api JSON
accounts.exportNoAccounts: No accounts match the export criteria
accounts.migrateDesc: Import healthy accounts from another codex2api instance. The remote instance must have 'Allow Remote Migration' enabled in Settings.
accounts.importDoneHint: Token refresh is still running in the background. You can close this dialog.
accounts.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this account?
accounts.confirmBatchDelete: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} selected accounts? This action cannot be undone.
accounts.refreshTokenPlaceholder: One refresh token per line. Bulk paste is supported.
accounts.proxyModeDesc: Choose how this account consumes proxy assignments.
accounts.proxyProtocolDesc: Fallback protocol when the proxy provider omits a type.
accounts.proxyProviderUrlDesc: Dynamic proxies will be retrieved from this endpoint for accounts that rely on a provider.
accounts.browserStreamingUnsupported: Your browser does not support streaming reads
accounts.connectionEndedUnexpectedly: The connection ended before a complete terminal event was received
accounts.noDataDesc: Import refresh tokens to populate the account pool
accounts.deleteDesc: Account {{account}} will be removed from the current pool. This usually cannot be undone.
accounts.batchDeleteDesc: {{count}} selected accounts will be removed from the current pool. Please confirm the selection is correct.
accounts.batchTestDone: Batch test complete: success {{success}} / banned {{banned}} / rate-limited {{rateLimited}} / failed {{failed}}
accounts.cleanBannedDesc: This clears all unauthorized status flags so those accounts can rejoin scheduling and testing.
accounts.cleanRateLimitedDesc: This clears all rate_limited status flags so those accounts can return to the schedulable pool.
accounts.cleanErrorDesc: This removes all accounts in error state (e.g. expired refresh tokens) from the pool.
accounts.oauthStep1Desc: Click the button below to generate a unique authorization link, then sign in with your OpenAI account.
accounts.oauthOpenLink: Open Authorization Page in New Tab
accounts.oauthStep2Desc: After authorizing, your browser will redirect to an inaccessible page (localhost:1455/...). Copy the full URL from your browser's address bar and paste it below.
accounts.oauthCallbackUrlHint: The URL should contain code and state parameters
accounts.oauthParseError: Could not parse code or state from the URL. Make sure you pasted the full callback URL.
accounts.oauthNamePlaceholder: Leave blank to use email as name
accounts.accessTokenPlaceholder: One access token per line. Bulk paste is supported.
accounts.folderNoValidFiles: No valid .txt or .json files found in the folder
accounts.unsupportedFileType: Unsupported file type: {{name}}. Only .txt and .json are supported
accounts.atWarning: AT-only accounts cannot auto-refresh. You will need to manually update the token after it expires.
accounts.lockHint: Locked accounts are skipped by auto-cleanup
accounts.unlockHint: Unlocked accounts will be subject to auto-cleanup
accounts.schedulerOverviewDesc: Shows live progress for background scans, manual refreshes, and import refresh jobs.
accounts.schedulerCurrentBatchHint: Scans every {{interval}} min and refreshes {{preExpire}} min before expiry
accounts.schedulerTaskIdleHint: No background refresh task is running right now
accounts.schedulerTaskDisabledHint: Automatic scanning is disabled; only manual refresh is available
accounts.schedulerTaskNotStartedHint: The first scheduled scan has not run yet since startup

ops.title: Operations
ops.description: Monitor service health, connection pools, and account runtime status.
ops.loadingDesc: Syncing service status, connection pools, and account runtime.
ops.overviewDesc: Auto-refreshes every 15 seconds for quick health checks.
ops.accountTrendDesc: {{added}} added, {{deleted}} deleted in the selected range
ops.accountTrendEmpty: No account events in the selected range

scheduler.title: Account Health Panel
scheduler.description: Monitor account health tiers, risk signals, and scheduler priorities in one view.
scheduler.loadingDesc: Syncing account health tiers and scheduling data.
scheduler.errorTitle: Failed to load account health panel
scheduler.globalViewDesc: System-level view of account health and high-risk distribution.
scheduler.noRiskAccounts: No high-risk accounts requiring attention. The pool is stable.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage system configuration and runtime parameters.
settings.globalRpmDesc: Maximum requests per minute globally. 0 means unlimited.
settings.testModelDesc: Model name used for connection testing
settings.pgMaxConnsDesc: Requires container restart to take effect.
settings.redisPoolSizeDesc: Requires container restart to take effect.
settings.proxyUrlDesc: Default proxy URL for new accounts
settings.proxyDefaultsDesc: Controls how new accounts inherit proxy routing.
settings.proxyModeDefaultDesc: Select the default mode assigned to newly added accounts.
settings.proxyProtocolDesc: This protocol is used when the provider does not specify one.
settings.proxyProviderUrlDesc: Accounts in dynamic or auto mode can call this endpoint to retrieve fresh proxies.
settings.proxyRotationDesc: When greater than 0, assigned dynamic proxies rotate after the specified number of hours.
settings.autoCleanUnauthorizedDesc: Checks every 30 seconds and removes accounts with unauthorized status.
settings.autoCleanRateLimitedDesc: Checks every 30 seconds and removes accounts with rate_limited status.
settings.autoCleanFullUsageDesc: Checks every 5 minutes and removes accounts with ≥ 100% usage. Accounts with active requests are skipped.
settings.autoCleanErrorDesc: Checks every 30 seconds and removes accounts in error state (e.g. expired refresh tokens).
settings.autoCleanExpiredDesc: Every 15 minutes, removes accounts older than 30 minutes regardless of usage. Runs immediately when toggled on.
settings.timezoneDesc: Controls date/time display in the frontend. The page will reload automatically after changing.
settings.allowRemoteMigrationDesc: When enabled, other codex2api instances can pull healthy accounts from this instance.
settings.allowRemoteMigrationRequiresSecret: Set an admin secret first. Remote migration cannot be enabled without admin authentication.
settings.adminSecretPlaceholder: Leave empty to disable admin auth
settings.adminSecretDesc: When set, all /api/admin/* endpoints require the X-Admin-Key header. If both the environment value and system setting are empty, startup fails.
settings.adminSecretEnvOverride: ADMIN_SECRET is currently enabled in the environment, so admin login uses the environment value first.
settings.modelsDesc: The following models are currently available:
settings.maxRetriesRange: Auto-retry with a different account on failure (0~10), 0 = no retry
settings.testModelHint: Model used for account connection testing
settings.refreshScanIntervalSecondsDesc: Controls how often the background scan runs. Keeping it at 1 minute or more is recommended.
settings.refreshPreExpireSecondsDesc: If an Access Token will expire within this window, the scanner refreshes it in advance.

proxies.description: Manage proxy pool with round-robin distribution to accounts
proxies.addFirstProxy: Please add at least one proxy first
proxies.addProxyDesc: One proxy URL per line, supports http:// / https:// / socks5:// format
proxies.noProxiesDesc: Click "Add Proxy" to configure the proxy pool

cpaSync.title: CPA Sync
cpaSync.description: Operations console for CPA inventory sync and Mihomo strategy management.
cpaSync.loadingDesc: Sync settings and runtime state are loading.
cpaSync.configDesc: Store the CPA and Mihomo settings used by the background sync worker.
cpaSync.configConsoleDesc: Edit configuration on the left, validate connectivity before saving, and keep runtime feedback visible while operating.
cpaSync.pendingRetestHint: The current form has changed. Save or retest to refresh this status.
cpaSync.cpaAuthFilesFound: CPA connection is healthy. Found {{count}} auth files.
cpaSync.mihomoCandidatesFound: Mihomo connection is healthy. The strategy group has {{count}} candidates.
cpaSync.mihomoServiceConnected: Mihomo service is reachable. Loaded {{count}} strategy groups.
cpaSync.mihomoServiceConnectedNoGroups: Mihomo service is reachable, but no strategy groups were returned.
cpaSync.cpaSectionDesc: Configure the CPA endpoint, management key, and replenishment thresholds.
cpaSync.mihomoSectionDesc: Connect the Mihomo controller and choose the strategy group to switch.
cpaSync.taskSectionDesc: Keep the automatic sync toggle here so it stays separate from manual actions.
cpaSync.taskToggleDesc: Enable or disable the background CPA sync loop.
cpaSync.testUsesCurrentForm: Connection tests use the current form values, even before saving.
cpaSync.runtimeDesc: Shows CPA inventory, banned-delete counts, the latest task result, and error summary at a glance.
cpaSync.overviewTabDesc: See runtime health, connection tests, and manual actions first.
cpaSync.logsTabDesc: Keep recent CPA sync records on a separate tab for easier investigation.
cpaSync.allConfigPresent: All required fields are currently present.
cpaSync.actionsDesc: Review recent upload, download, delete, reconcile, switch, and run events in time order.
cpaSync.manualDesc: Run one full sync round or switch the Mihomo strategy group manually.
cpaSync.runHint: Runs one complete CPA sync cycle using the current saved backend settings.
cpaSync.switchHint: Switches the configured Mihomo strategy group without triggering sync or upload work.
cpaSync.cpaTestDesc: Validate the CPA management API with the current form values.
cpaSync.mihomoTestDesc: Validate selector visibility and optional delay testing against Mihomo.
cpaSync.strategyGroupsLoaded: Mihomo strategy groups loaded. You can choose one from the dropdown.
cpaSync.strategyGroupHint: After filling the Mihomo URL and Secret, the page will load strategy groups automatically.
cpaSync.strategyGroupFallback: If the list cannot be loaded, enter the strategy group manually
cpaSync.fillMihomoFirst: Fill in the Mihomo URL and Secret first
cpaSync.noStrategyGroups: No switchable strategy groups were found.
cpaSync.switchRuleHint: Current rule: switch immediately when {{uploads}} banned accounts are deleted within {{minutes}} minutes; the counter resets after switching.
